name: COPD Workers' Comp Claims from Chemical Exposure in West Valley City

mainEntity.name: Can I file a workers' comp claim for COPD from workplace chemical exposure in West Valley City?
mainEntity.text: Can I file a workers' comp claim for COPD from workplace chemical exposure in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, COPD from workplace chemical exposure qualifies as an occupational disease under Utah workers' comp if medically linked to work exposure exceeding community levels, per Utah Code §34A-3-101.

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah recognizes COPD as compensable if a doctor links it to specific workplace irritants like welding fumes or solvents in West Valley City manufacturing. Prove exposure via air monitoring records or co-worker testimony. Employers may argue pre-existing smoking; independent medical exams are key. Secure benefits for treatment, wage loss up to 312 weeks, and permanent impairment awards.

description: Yes, COPD from workplace chemical exposure qualifies as an occupational disease under Utah workers' comp if medically linked to work exposure exceeding communit
